summary: Establish the M4 render-thumbnail foundation: strict fixed-size PNG records, bounded clone-safe application storage, opaque desktop profile persistence, recent-project workspace identity migration, and an accepted-render identity seam for later capture and presentation work.

decisions.decision: Store only strict version-1 240x160 PNG records with bounded bytes, canonical paths and identities, optional application-owned geometry identity, and defensive copies.
decisions.rationale: A fixed raster contract keeps preview memory and persistence bounded while preventing malformed or source-owned data from entering the application store.

decisions.decision: Keep thumbnails in app/profile storage, isolate by opaque workspace identity, replace by document path, and evict least-recently-used records under a 16 MiB in-memory budget and platform persistence caps.
decisions.rationale: Thumbnails are derived workspace state, never project source or exported project bytes; bounded eviction prevents unbounded retention.

decisions.decision: Persist recent projects as strict v2 entries carrying workspaceIdentity, while reading strict v1 entries through a deterministic projectId fallback and deleting the legacy key only after a successful v2 write.
decisions.rationale: The thumbnail scope needs a stable opaque project boundary without breaking existing profile data or deleting it before the replacement is durable.

decisions.decision: Record each accepted render action as presentation.renderIdentity while retaining modelIdentity for geometry-continuity and measurement semantics.
decisions.rationale: A cache hit or cosmetic rerender can preserve geometry state while still requiring a distinct capture identity; conflating the two would mislabel thumbnails and deltas.

testEvidence.criterion: Thumbnail records reject malformed dimensions, identities, paths, timestamps, MIME types, non-PNG bytes, unknown fields, malformed base64, and oversized payloads while round-tripping defensively.
testEvidence.test: Run the thumbnail codec and store tests.

red.outcome: RED: the thumbnail module and render-identity seam were absent; 2 focused viewer assertions and the new module import failed.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 26 passed (26); Duration 503ms.

testEvidence.criterion: Recent-project v1 data migrates safely to strict v2 and desktop thumbnail persistence is fail-closed, bounded, opaque-keyed, and clone-safe.
testEvidence.test: Run the recent-project and persistence focused suites.

red.outcome: RED: the v2 workspace identity and thumbnail persistence contracts were not implemented.

green.outcome: GREEN: included in the combined focused run; 64 tests passed across 8 files.

testEvidence.criterion: The complete TypeScript surface and affected source remain clean.

red.outcome: RED: missing thumbnail-store module and ViewerPresentation.renderIdentity caused three diagnostics while BUILD A was incomplete.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd exec biome check src/application/thumbnails/thumbnail-store.ts src/application/viewer/viewer-state.ts src/application/files/recent-projects.ts src/application/files/project-session.ts src/platform-web/browser-project-metadata.ts src/application/render-cache/render-thumbnail-persistence.ts src/platform-desktop/desktop-thumbnail-persistence.ts tests/application/thumbnails/thumbnail-store.test.ts tests/application/viewer/viewer-state.test.ts tests/application/files/recent-projects.test.ts tests/application/files/project-session.test.ts tests/application/render-cache/render-thumbnail-persistence.test.ts tests/platform-desktop/desktop-thumbnail-persistence.test.ts tests/platform-web/browser-project-metadata.test.ts
green.outcome: GREEN: tsc exited 0; Biome checked 14 files with no fixes.

nearMisses.sought: Native and browser capture/UI walkthrough evidence for FR-15.13
nearMisses.confirmation: Not claimed in this groundwork unit; capture, runtime wiring, Welcome/file-tree presentation, and clean-host timing remain pending for the FR-15.13 exit gate.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
